security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'; font-src 'self' data:; worker-src 'self' blob:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost https://oauth2.googleapis.com https://www.googleapis.com

bundle.shortDescription: Glassy Markdown notes synced to Google Drive.
bundle.longDescription: Stela is a minimalist, glassy Markdown note-taking app with smooth caret animation, bilingual FR/EN spell checking, and Google Drive as the source of truth.
